@@ -424,7 +424,7 @@
 {"id":"franken_numpy-fyxg","title":"Allow non-finite propagation in NxN solve/inv","description":"## Problem
`solve_nxn`, `solve_nxn_multi`, and `inv_nxn` currently fail closed because `lu_decompose` rejects any non-finite matrix entries. NumPy instead propagates or computes through many non-finite NxN solve/inv cases.

## Evidence
- `np.linalg.inv` and `np.linalg.solve` on 3x3 matrices with `NaN` or `inf` entries produce concrete outputs instead of raising
- off-diagonal `NaN` often contaminates whole results; diagonal `inf` can still yield finite sub-block outputs
- current Rust path errors before decomposition

## Goal
Match NumPy-style non-finite propagation for the LU-backed NxN inverse/solve paths without changing unrelated finite error handling.

## Files
- `crates/fnp-linalg/src/lib.rs`","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-01T17:10:48.950823838Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-01T17:51:26.591797122Z","closed_at":"2026-04-01T17:51:26.591527222Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"franken_numpy-g1ji","title":"[PORT] fnp_python.random.BitGenerator abstract base class exposure","description":"numpy.random.BitGenerator is an abstract base that MT19937/PCG64/etc.
inherit from. Users write `isinstance(rng, np.random.BitGenerator)` to
test. fnp_python exposes the concrete bit generators but not the base.

Options:
1. Declare PyBitGenerator as a pyclass with no methods; make the 5
   concrete classes have it as their #[pyclass(extends = PyBitGenerator)].
2. Passthrough: just re-export numpy.random.BitGenerator so isinstance
   checks work against numpy's actual class.

Preferred: option 2, because numpy allows subclassing BitGenerator in
user code and the wire shape needs to match numpy's real class.

Success: `from fnp_python.random import BitGenerator` resolves, and
isinstance(fnp_python.random.PCG64(), numpy.random.BitGenerator) returns
True (re-export equivalence). Parity test gated on numpy_available.

Part of franken_numpy-lxmb.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-24T21:55:59.160902538Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-24T22:04:08.015868255Z","closed_at":"2026-04-24T22:04:08.013356722Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"franken_numpy-g1ji","depends_on_id":"franken_numpy-lxmb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-24T21:56:58.647838940Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
